headline_seed: Iran Says the US’s Latest Proposal Has ‘Narrowed the Gaps’ - Bloomberg.com
draft_text:
Iran says it is reviewing the latest U.S. proposal, with gaps "narrowed to some extent." Trump told CBS News he'll wait "a couple of days" before ordering strikes — and warned the U.S. is "all ready to go."

Pakistan's army chief lands in Tehran today to mediate.
